title: T. Choithram And Sons, LLC ransomware incident

extortion.description: Choithrams is a prominent grocery retail chain and distributor in the UAE, Bahrain, Qatar, and Oman, established in 1974. The company offers a wide range of over 500 quality products, including tea, spices, nuts, and grains, all meeting HACCP certification for food safety. Known for its vast logistics and distribution network, Choithrams collaborates with hundreds of major FMCG brands, servicing a majority of food outlets in the region. Their commitment to trust, innovation, and sustainability has positioned them as a partner of choice in the grocery sector.As a bonus, we offer scanned documents of all key employees of the company's IT department:https://gofile.io/d/QwY56BA large volume of SQL and SAP data is also available. Passports for nearly all employees are available. We will also provide access to the corporate network and assign an IT department employee who will be forced to cooperate due to the existence of highly compromising information against them.write to us for information:Qualitydatarecovery@mail.com
